title: I Stopped Typing to OpenClaw — Typeless voice dictation
summary: Typeless is an AI voice dictation tool that enables users to compose and control applications via speech input at significantly higher speeds than typing. The tool supports multilingual content creation, AI-assisted transcription, and integration with other applications through voice-controlled actions.
